thesis: AFTER-HOURS window (17:00-ET slot, generated 2026-07-21T20:48:24Z / ~16:48 ET Tuesday 7/21) — the next-session plan on the latest live tick. NOTE the deterministic snapshot self-labels window='pre-close' and marketClosed=false, so these values are a late-day / after-hours LIVE tick for 7/21, NOT a confirmed settled 7/21 daily close; snapshot.nextSessionDate has not rolled past 7/21, so the plan is authored for that date. STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended tech-led structural bull is DIGESTING near all-time highs; through the session the index FIRMED but leadership breadth is still NOT repaired. What matured: SPY 748.28 HELD its 50-day reclaim (+0.6% above ~743.8, up from +0.46% this morning) and pressed to -1.23% off the ATH (~757.6) while VIX eased further to 17.05 (band 17.1, down ~0.33 from the 17.38 morning read and ~1.6 from the 18.65 that held overnight). What DETERIORATED: MSFT 397.75 FADED back BELOW its 50-day (now -0.73% under ~400.7, from +0.01% exactly on it at midday) — the intraday tag FAILED to hold and it stays bear-stacked, -8.92% below its 200-day. QQQ 708.97 recovered slightly to -1.37% below its 50-day (~718.8, from -1.61%) but stays TANGLED — the reclaim is still UNWON. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars is 7 (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17); 7/17 is the last bar Tier-A can confirm — Monday 7/20 completed as a session but no distinct settled 7/20 close is separately carried, and today 7/21 is a live intraday/after-hours tick — neither is counted, and intraday reruns are not counted. FRAME: SPMO 149.7 bull-stacked (sitting on its 50-day, ma50Dist -0.39) / VGT 116.01 tangled, both soft short-term (mom5 -2.07 / VGT -0.94). ROTATION unchanged and confirmed on this run's live RRG (sector read asOf 2026-07-21T20:48:24Z, 'Rotate toward XLK as XLV weakens'): XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.47>100, accel +1.35, rsMom 102.25 board-best, rotation into, +13.82% over its 200-day) with commodities confirming underneath (real-assets 13:30Z: PDBC 68.3 Uptrend leads, commodity breadth 75); XLK Improving up (accel +1.36, rotation into) while XLV Weakening (accel -3.46, worst, out), XLF Weakening (accel -1.5, out) and XLI Weakening (out); the prior defensive/rate bid fades (XLRE Peaking accel -0.17 out, XLP Lagging). Semis re-rated to Leading (SOXX rsMom 100.26, accel +1.93, rotation into) but internals stay thin (3/12 above their 50-day, 1/12 up-momentum, rsMom1m -13.77). TACTICAL, last: monthly OPEX (7/17) is RESOLVED and dealer gamma has RESET — prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed. PLAN: HOLD the bull-stack and do NOT chase index beta up here into ATH resistance while QQQ is still tangled below its 50-day (SPY's held reclaim needs QQQ to confirm the broadening); ROTATE toward the confirmed Leading XLE and Improving XLK over weakening XLV/XLF; TRIM stretched, internally-thin semis into any strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT after it failed to hold its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail — the even-lower VIX makes it cheaper to carry, not less necessary — after re-verifying the live path; stay OUT of precious-metal havens (GLD 13.4 / SLV 0, no clean bid).
